model_comparison: Model 1 failed to follow the paralinguistic instruction, generating a high-pitched, unnatural voice instead of the requested 'very low pitch'. It also suffered from robotic prosody. Model 2, in contrast, produced a high-quality, natural-sounding audio with a lower, grounded pitch and serious tone that perfectly matched the semantic context and the user's command.
